label: Flow as Tool
description: Wrap a saved Flow as a callable tool. Maps caller args to the wrapped flow's trigger input via inputMapping, runs the flow as a sub-execution, and extracts a value at outputExtract from the result. V1: callable from a parent flow; agent dynamic-tool integration is V1.1.

settings.name: flowId
settings.label: Flow ID
settings.description: ID of the saved Flow to invoke as a sub-execution. Must belong to the same tenant as the parent flow.

settings.name: toolName
settings.label: Tool name
settings.description: Friendly name for this tool — echoed back in output for downstream introspection. Used by V1.1 agent integration to expose the tool in agent catalogs.

settings.name: toolDescription
settings.label: Tool description
settings.description: Plain-language description of what the wrapped flow does. Surfaces to agents in V1.1.

settings.name: inputMapping
settings.label: Input mapping
settings.description: Map of trigger-input key → value (or {{args.X}} template). Each value runs through the engine interpolation layer. Empty mapping passes the input through verbatim.

settings.name: outputExtract
settings.label: Output extract (dot path)
settings.description: Dot/bracket path into the sub-flow's final output. Empty = return the full output.

settings.name: maxDepth
settings.label: Max recursion depth
settings.description: Hard cap on sub-flow nesting depth. Prevents infinite recursion when a flow accidentally wraps itself.

ai.shortDescription: Run another saved Flow as a sub-execution and pull a value out of its output.
ai.whenToUse: When you want to compose flows from smaller reusable building blocks — same pattern as sub_workflow, plus arg-mapping and output-extraction so the wrapped flow looks like a 'tool' the parent calls.
ai.examplePrompt: invoke the 'analyze_logs' flow with the trigger.body.window argument and pull .summary from the response
ai.promptHints: Output: {{steps.X.value}} for the extracted value; {{steps.X.raw}} for the full sub-flow output. Use sub_workflow instead when you don't need arg-mapping or output-extraction.

outputAssertions.name: has_envelope
outputAssertions.errorMessage: flow_tool output is missing required envelope keys (flowId).
